mapper.insert:
insert into msg_notify_member_task (id, event_id, departmember_id, notify_time, create_time) values
( #{item.id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.eventId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.departmemberId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.notifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
on duplicate key update create_time = sysdate()
mapper.select:
SELECT ei.id eventId, ei.event_name eventName, ei.event_level eventLevel, ei.event_content eventContent, ei.lng,ei.lat,ei.address,ei.happen_time happenTime, emi.pic1_path pic1Path, emi.pic2_path pic2Path, emi.pic3_path pic3Path, emi.video_path videoPath, emi.file_path filePath FROM event_info ei LEFT JOIN msg_notify_member_task mmt ON mmt.event_id = ei.id LEFT JOIN department_member dm ON mmt.departmember_id = dm.id LEFT JOIN event_media_info emi ON ei.id = emi.event_id WHERE dm.user_id = #{userId}
and ei.event_status = #{eventStatus}

select mmt.departmember_id as memberId,dm.`name` as memberName,dm.department_id departId,di.`name` as departName from msg_notify_member_task mmt left join department_member dm on mmt.departmember_id = dm.id left join department_info di on dm.department_id = di.id where mmt.event_id = #{eventId} and dm.department_id in
#{item}
